title: 新山温馨疗养别墅EHA Golfview Eldercare Mansion (Johor Jaya) #1 Nursing Home Johor Bahru
address: Daiman18 Golf Club, 85, Jalan Pesona, Taman Johor Jaya, 81100 Johor Bahru, Johor Darul Ta'zim, Malaysia

peopleAlsoSearch.title: Pusat Jagaan Warga Emas Anwarul Mahabbah Care Centre Johor Bahru

reviews.text: 这是一家很棒的疗养中心，每个员工都很用心照顾老人家。妈妈离开还哭着很舍不得照顾她的kakak们。感恩有你们。谢谢。
reviews.textTranslated: This is a wonderful nursing home; every staff member takes excellent care of the elderly residents. My mother cried as she left, very sad to part with the caregivers. Thank you all. Thank you.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
非常感谢您的宝贵反馈与肯定。
我们团队一直秉持用心与爱心照顾每一位长者，能得到您的认可，是对我们最大的鼓励。
祝大家身体安康，也感谢您对本中心的信任与支持。

reviews.text: EHA takes very good care of my grandmother. The place is clean, comfortable, and feels like home. Ms. Joey is very responsive and caring, and all the staff are friendly, patient, and responsible. We’re very happy and thankful for their care. Highly recommend EHA!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your kind words and recommendation ❤️
We’re truly grateful for your trust in EHA. Taking good care of your grandmother is our privilege, and we’re happy to know she feels comfortable and at home here.
Your appreciation means a lot to Ms. Joey and the entire team. Thank you for your support!

reviews.text: 请问食物有猪肉吗？
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 您好，有的。

reviews.text: Very home, caring management and staffs. Special shout out to Ms Joey, Ms. Anita and Ms Jo for taking good care of my mom recovery. My mom had a fall 6 months ago and god bless we found an available bed for her at EHA Eldercare. They have in-house doctor visits and also physiotherapy service that physiotherapist will visit 2 times a week. This saved us a lot of hassle and inconvenience. Any medical help that my mom needs will be carefully monitored and worked for her recovery. Thanks to all the staffs who taken good care of my mom.  EHA Eldercare Centre is highly recommended.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you very much for sharing such a heartfelt review ❤️
We’re truly grateful for your trust in EHA Eldercare and are thankful that we could be part of your mom’s recovery journey. Knowing she is improving and well cared for means everything to us.
Your kind words for Ms. Joey, Ms. Anita, Ms. Jho, and the entire team will surely encourage them—they genuinely care for every resident as family.
We’re also glad our in-house doctor visits and physiotherapy services could ease your concerns and reduce the hassle for your family.
Thank you once again for your recommendation and support. Wishing your mom continued recovery, good health, and comfort 🌷

reviews.text:
您好！
在这几个月里，您们对我姐姐 Ong Sock Moi
无微不至的照顾与关怀，我们全家都看在眼里，感激在心。感谢您们的耐心、细心和爱心，让她在老人院这个“第二个家"中得到了温暖与安心的照顾。
无论是日常的饮食起居，还是健康管理与情感陪伴，您们都尽心尽力，尤其是在她身体不适或情绪低落时，您们的鼓励与安慰更是给予了她极大的支持。作为家属，我们深知照护工作的辛苦，也更加由衷地感激您们的专业与付出。
谢谢您们的辛勤工作与人文关怀。愿您们在今后的工作中一切顺利，健康平安！
此致敬礼！
Ang Family
reviews.textTranslated:
Hello!
Over the past few months, our entire family has witnessed and deeply appreciated your meticulous care and concern for my sister, Ong Sock Moi. Thank you for your patience, attentiveness, and compassion, which have provided her with warmth and peace of mind in this "second home" of ours.
From daily care to health management and emotional support, you have dedicated yourself to her. Your encouragement and comfort have been a tremendous support, especially during times of physical discomfort or emotional distress. As family members, we understand the hardships of caregiving and are deeply grateful for your professionalism and dedication.
Thank you for your hard work and compassionate care. We wish you all the best in your future endeavors and hope for your health and safety!
Sincerely,
Ang Family
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your kind and heartfelt words. It truly means a lot to us to know that our EHA care for Ong Sock Moi has brought comfort to her and to your family. Your appreciation and support are deeply encouraging. I’m grateful for the trust you placed in EHA.
Wishing Ong Sock Moi continued strength, and sending our warmest regards to your entire family.

reviews.text: Great servis.my mother really enjoy stay here. Thank you nurse. Kakak.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your kind words!
We’re truly glad to hear that your mother enjoyed her stay with us. It means a lot to know that she felt comfortable and well cared for. 
Wishing your family all the best!

reviews.text: Thanks for everyone here. They’re taking care of me well after my knee cap replacement surgery. I’m able to recover soon here. The environment here also very nice. Highly recommended this elder care home.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your kind words. We’re truly happy to hear that you’re feeling well taken care of and that your recovery is progressing smoothly after your knee cap replacement surgery.

It means a lot to us to know that you feel comfortable and supported here at EHA. Your positive spirit is an inspiration to both our team and fellow residents.

We’re always here to support you on your journey to full recovery. Thank you again for your recommendation—it truly encourages us to keep doing our best every day.

Wishing you continued strength and a speedy recovery!

reviews.text:
致EHA疗养院全体工作人员：

我母亲在EHA疗养院休养了大约两年的时间。在这段期间，承蒙你们细心、耐心与无微不至的照料，让她在生活与精神上都得到安慰与尊严。

上个星期，我母亲安详离世。虽然我们心中满是伤痛，但想到她在最后的日子里，得到了EHA疗养院团队的悉心关怀，我们感到由衷的感恩与安慰。

在此，我们特别感谢 Ms Hana、Ms Tan、Syika、Anita 和 Nohfi 以及所有工作人员对我母亲的照顾。你们的爱心与付出，不仅温暖了她的心，也深深安慰了我们全家。

谨代表家人，向EHA疗养院致以最诚挚的谢意。
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To All Staff of EHA Nursing Home:

My late mother resided at EHA Nursing Home for about two years. During this time, she received not only attentive and professional care, but also patience, kindness, and compassion, which gave her both comfort and dignity.

She passed away peacefully last week. Although our family is deeply saddened by her passing, we are truly grateful that in her final days she was cared for with such dedication by the EHA team.

We would like to especially thank Ms Hana, Ms Tan, Syika, Anita, and Nohfi, together with all the staff members, for your care and devotion. Your kindness not only warmed her heart but also brought great comfort to our family.

On behalf of my family, I extend our sincerest gratitude to the EHA Nursing Home team.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Kepada Seluruh Staf Panti Jompo EHA:

Ibu saya telah dirawat di Panti Jompo EHA selama kurang lebih dua tahun. Dalam masa tersebut, beliau menerima perhatian, kesabaran, dan perawatan yang penuh kasih sayang dari seluruh tim, sehingga beliau dapat menjalani hari-harinya dengan kenyamanan dan martabat.

Minggu lalu, ibu saya meninggal dunia dengan tenang. Walaupun kami sekeluarga sangat berduka atas kepergiannya, kami merasa sangat bersyukur karena di hari-hari terakhirnya beliau mendapatkan perawatan yang penuh ketulusan dari tim EHA.

Di sini, kami secara khusus ingin menyampaikan terima kasih kepada Ibu Hana, Ibu Tan, Syika, Anita, dan Nohfi, serta seluruh staf, atas perhatian dan pengabdian kalian. Ketulusan dan kasih sayang kalian tidak hanya menghangatkan hati beliau, tetapi juga membawa penghiburan yang mendalam bagi keluarga kami.

Atas nama keluarga, saya menyampaikan rasa terima kasih yang setulus-tulusnya kepada seluruh tim Panti Jompo EHA.

From: LIM TERNG CHUN （林腾骏）
reviews.textTranslated:
To the entire staff of EHA Nursing Home:

My mother spent approximately two years recuperating at EHA Nursing Home. During this time, your attentive, patient, and meticulous care provided her with comfort and dignity, both physically and mentally.

Last week, my mother passed away peacefully. While our hearts are filled with grief, we are deeply grateful and comforted by the loving care she received from the EHA Nursing Home team in her final days.

We would like to express our special thanks to Ms. Hana, Ms. Tan, Syika, Anita, Nohfi, and all the staff for their care of my mother. Your love and dedication not only warmed her heart but also brought deep comfort to our entire family.

On behalf of my family, we express our sincerest gratitude to EHA Nursing Home. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To All Staff of EHA Nursing Home:

My late mother resided at EHA Nursing Home for about two years. During this time, she received not only attentive and professional care, but also patience, kindness, and compassion, which gave her both comfort and dignity.

She passed away peacefully last week. Although our family is deeply saddened by her passing, we are truly grateful that in her final days she was cared for with such dedication by the EHA team.

We would like to especially thank Ms Hana, Ms Tan, Syika, Anita, and Nohfi, together with all the staff members, for your care and devotion. Your kindness not only warmed her heart but also brought great comfort to our family.

On behalf of my family, I extend our sincerest gratitude to the EHA Nursing Home team.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Kepada Seluruh Staf Panti Jompo EHA:

Ibu saya telah dirawat di Panti Jompo EHA selama kurang lebih dua tahun. Dalam masa tersebut, beliau menerima perhatian, kesabaran, dan perawatan yang penuh kasih sayang dari seluruh tim, sehingga beliau dapat menjalani hari-harinya dengan kenyamanan dan martabat.

Walaupun kami sekeluarga sangat berduka atas kepergiannya, kami merasa sangat bersyukur karena di hari-hari terakhirnya beliau mendapatkan perawatan yang penuh ketulusan dari tim EHA.

Di sini, kami secara khusus ingin menyampaikan terima kasih kepada Ibu Hana, Ibu Tan, Syika, Anita, dan Nohfi, serta seluruh staf, atas perhatian dan pengabdian kalian.

Atas nama keluarga, saya menyampaikan rasa terima kasih yang setulus-tulusnya kepada seluruh tim Panti Jompo EHA.

From: LIM TERNG CHUN
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Mr. Lim Terng Chun and Family,

On behalf of all of us at EHA Nursing Home, we would like to express our deepest condolences on the passing of your beloved mother. We are truly sorry for your loss.

We are deeply grateful for your kind and heartfelt message. It means a great deal to our entire team to know that the care and compassion we provided brought comfort to your mother and your family during her time with us.

Please be assured that Ms. Hana, Ms. Tan, Ms Joey, Syika, Anita, Novi, and the rest of the staff are sincerely touched by your appreciation. It was a privilege to care for your mother over the past two years, and we are honoured to have been part of her life journey.

Thank you once again for placing your trust in us. We wish you and your family strength and peace in the days ahead.
We appreciate your satisfaction with 5 star review!

reviews.text: 非常感恩☺️ 经过EHA护理人员的耐心照顾 我的阿姨康复出院了 服务到位 护理知识全面 推荐的一家疗养中心👍
reviews.textTranslated: I am so grateful ☺️ Thanks to the patient care of the EHA nursing staff, my aunt has recovered and been discharged from the hospital. The service was excellent and their nursing knowledge was comprehensive. I highly recommend this nursing home 👍
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing such a positive experience and take your precious time to write such an awesome review. We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can.

reviews.text: 感谢EHA所有的工作人员把我母亲照顾得很好 尤其是经理Joey,护士syika非常有耐心以及拥有专业的护理知识，让我能够放心的把手术后的母亲让他们照顾。看护们也非常的有耐心。通过物理治疗，我的母亲也已经完全康复了。感恩🙏
reviews.textTranslated: Thanks to all the staff of EHA for taking good care of my mother, especially the manager Joey and the nurse Syika, who are very patient and have professional nursing knowledge, so I can rest assured to let them take care of my mother after the operation. The caregivers are also very patient. Through physical therapy, my mother has fully recovered. Thank you 🙏
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your positive experience at EHA Lakeview! We are thrilled to hear that you found our team members are caring and professional.
We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can. 🥰
We appreciate your satisfaction with 5 star review!

reviews.text: bad service👎👎👎
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Alice, we couldn’t find any record of serving you, but we truly value feedback from our customers. If you have visited us, please feel free to contact us at 019-7283697 so we can understand more and assist you if needed.

reviews.text: professional and caring EHA Eldercare care centre, thank you🌹🌹🌹
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing such a positive experience! It truly means a lot to our team! 😍

reviews.text: 我舅舅几个月前因为意外跌倒而入住了你们的疗养院。现在他已经康复，正在家中休养。非常感谢Hana、Joey，以及所有护士和照顾人员，这三个月来对我舅舅的耐心、爱心和专业照顾。你们的细心陪伴与付出，让我们全家都非常安心和感动。要不是有你们的帮助，我真的不知道该如何照顾我舅舅。衷心感谢你们！
reviews.textTranslated: My uncle was admitted to your nursing home a few months ago after an accidental fall. He has now recovered and is recuperating at home. We are extremely grateful to Hana, Joey, and all the nurses and caregivers for their patience, love, and professional care of my uncle over the past three months. Your attentive companionship and dedication have given our whole family great peace of mind and touched us deeply. Without your help, I truly don't know how I would have been able to care for my uncle. Thank you from the bottom of my heart!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing such a positive experience and take your precious time to write such an awesome review. We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can. 😍

reviews.text: Always same food and still increase price. I have moved my father out. Near golf course, i also worried insecticides, fungicides, rodenticides, and herbicides which are usually spray on golf courses.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Sherry,

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. We truly value all feedback, as it helps us reflect and improve. According to our records from the past 30 days, no male residents have moved out of our Home. As we’re unable to identify your case based on this review, we warmly invite you to reach out to us directly at 019-7283697 or email hq.ehagroup@gmail.com — we would appreciate the opportunity to better understand your concerns.

In terms of food and pricing, we continuously review our menus to ensure meals are nutritious, balanced, and suitable for our residents’ needs. Like many care providers, we have faced rising costs in ingredients and staffing, but we remain committed to delivering quality and care at a fair value. We’re always open to hearing suggestions to serve our residents even better.

Regarding the nearby golf course, it is a long-established and professionally maintained facility that follows strict safety protocols, including responsible use of insecticides and herbicides. Our surrounding neighborhood is exclusively home to millionaire families, many of whom have lived here for over 20 years — and, like us, they prioritize health and environmental safety.

We remain committed to transparent, compassionate care and would be glad to speak with you personally if you’d like to share more.
We truly appreciate your 5-star review of our eldercare services! Your feedback holds immense value to our team. Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us!

reviews.text: Excellent experienced
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for your kind feedback!
We’re delighted to hear that you had an excellent experience. Your support means a lot to us, and we look forward to continuing to serve you and your family with care and dedication.
We appreciate your satisfaction with 5 star review!
We appreciate your satisfaction with 5 star review!
We appreciate your satisfaction with 5 star review!

reviews.text: Thank you for taking care of my mother very well.

reviews.text: The environment and service here is good. Thanks for everyone's here.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your kind words! We’re delighted to hear that you found the environment and service satisfactory. Your appreciation means a lot to our entire team. If you ever need assistance again, don’t hesitate to reach out. Wishing you all the best!

reviews.text:
The manager Ms Joey is friendly and supportive
Their missy also have great knowledge on the medicines
Their caregiver is friendly as well
Their location is convenient as just exit from Pasir Gudang hwy within 5min can reach
they also provide entertainment so that elderly won’t feel bored
They have physiotherapy package when you in need
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your detailed review! We’re delighted to hear that Ms. Joey provided friendly and supportive service, and that our nurse’s knowledge on medicines met your expectations. We’re also glad that our caregivers’ friendliness and our convenient location added to your positive experience. Providing entertainment and physiotherapy packages to ensure the comfort and well-being of our residents is our priority. Your feedback motivates us to continue offering the best care possible. If you need anything in the future, feel free to reach out!

reviews.text:
谢谢照顾。我 康复了。要回家了。

也榭谢护士Darsini.很照顾我

Also thank you nurse Darsini. Take good care of me
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 我们很高兴得知您已经康复，并且对我们的服务感到满意。Joey经理和护士Darsini也非常感谢您的认可。能够满足您的需求、为您提供周到的照顾是我们的荣幸。祝您身体健康，生活愉快！如果未来有任何需要，欢迎随时联系我们。

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi CF Ngim, Thank you for your kind review! We’re glad you're happy with the cleanliness, staff, and facilities. We appreciate your feedback on the food variety and will work on improving it. Thanks!

reviews.text:
We are blessed and happy that this is the first centre we choose, our dad has been well taken care of at EHA Eldercare mansion since year 2023.
Very spacious, well-maintained and clean mansion, it provides a comfortable environment and hygiene stays for the elderly.

Most importantly, we are grateful for the staffs, caregivers and nurses are well trained and experience to look after the residents daily activities, medication, different variety of meal etc.

We would like to compliment and thank the team that create the mansion with full of love, warm heart and supports:
Eric, Hana, Ai Shan & Joey - assist us upon first visit for viewing at mansion. Explanation in details of the centre facilities and daily operations and care of the residents.

Caregiver: Novi who assigned to look after our dad during the stay, very patience and energetic person.
Another Caregivers: Yanti; Yarni; Resa; Anita; Lia; Fang and Nurse Syariqah that rotate take care of our dad. They are fantastic and professional.

Highly recommended this EHA group if would like your elderly loved one to have happy, good quality environment and service. Your loved one will be well taken care without worried.

Once again thanks to EHA Team
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for sharing such a heartfelt positive experience with our eldercare services! It truly means a lot to our team.
We're overjoyed that our team provided you with exceptional eldercare services.

reviews.text: Very good service and very clean environment.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Lc Nee, Thank you for sharing such a positive experience! It truly means a lot to our team!

reviews.text: My mum has been well taken care of at EHA nursing home and I am grateful for their excellent services. The environment is spacious and nice, conducive for the elderly particularly it provides a great home ambiance. Most importantly, the staff (centre manager, nurses, caregivers, physiotherapist, cook) are helpful, friendly and jovial. I am satisfied and happy that I have found this nursing home for my mum, a place full of love, care, support and warmth. A big thank you to EHA!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi HG, Thank you for sharing such a positive experience and take your precious time to write such an awesome review. We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can.

reviews.text: 很赞的疗养院👍🏼
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Loyins,Thanks for recommending EHA Group for eldercare services!

reviews.text: My mother-in-law has been residing at this eldercare facility for over a month, and I'm genuinely happy with their service. The staff are compassionate, making her feel at home. The facility itself is clean and well-maintained. I'm pleased with the medical care provided, ensuring her health is closely monitored. I highly recommend this eldercare for anyone seeking a caring and quality environment for their loved ones.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Henry, Thank you for trusting our eldercare services!

reviews.text: 谢谢 照顾我父亲

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Angela, We greatly appreciate your trust for our eldercare services!

reviews.text: 感恩你们这些日子对妈妈的照顾，尤其是坏境很舒服及清洁。。。谢谢你们❤️
reviews.textTranslated: Thank you for taking such good care of Mom these past few days, especially the comfortable and clean environment. Thank you ❤️
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for trusting our eldercare services! You deserve quality care, and our teams work tirelessly to provide just that for you.

reviews.text:
细心有耐心护工kakak很和祥，我母亲在那休养三个月就像在大家庭里，很满意
😘
reviews.textTranslated:
The attentive and patient caregiver, Kakak, was very kind and gentle. My mother felt like she was in a big family during her three-month stay there, and she was very satisfied.

😘
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for trusting our eldercare services!
